# ØRIONS — Creative Agency, Bangkok

> ØRIONS (orions.agency) is a Bangkok-based creative agency. It opens every engagement with one question — "ยอด หรือ แบรนด์?" (sales or brand?) — and is organised into TWO clearly separate sides for two kinds of client. Founder & Creative Director: Ratthakan Suwanphakdee (รัฐกันต์ สุวรรณภักดี).

## The two sides
- **ORIONS Online** (/online) — the performance side. Ads, social media and content, fast and affordable. Goal: sales / leads (ยอด). HAS a published rate card and monthly packages; billed monthly. Clients hold and top up their own ad accounts and ØRIONS does NOT mark up ad spend (0%). Quick-turn production lives here too.
- **ORIONS Boutique** (/boutique) — the creative-craft side. Brand strategy, identity, big-idea campaigns, brand film and art direction at advertising grade. Goal: a brand people remember and choose (แบรนด์). NO rate card — quoted per campaign/project, billed per project.
- One team runs both; a client can pick one side or use both (often start Online for cash flow, then add Boutique to build the brand).

## The ORIONS Standard
Work is not "delivered and done" — ØRIONS agrees on a baseline and metrics up front (brand recall, consideration, branded search, CPL trend), re-measures at 45 and 90 days, and keeps refining until targets are met.

## Proof (real, countable)
- 40+ video productions (reels, music videos, long-form)
- 15 music videos for real artists, including PANCAKE, NUM KALA, URBOYTJ, ZOM MARIE, กวาง จิรพรรณ, นุ่นนิ่น ชาลิสสา, ปิ๋ม ชุติมา, วี พนมภูไท, Innertears
- 8 brand cases spanning strategy through production

## Principles
- พูดตรง (speak straight) — honest about fit; will say when it is not the right time, and does not sell dreams
- Constraints are the brief — the best work happens under limits
- Pay only for what you use — augment a team, don't replace it

## Key pages
- Home (the two-door): https://orions.agency/
- ORIONS Online (performance · rate card): https://orions.agency/online
- ORIONS Boutique (craft · quoted): https://orions.agency/boutique

- About: https://orions.agency/about
- Contact: https://orions.agency/contact

## How to start
Book a free 45-minute call (no obligation). ØRIONS will tell you honestly whether to start with the Online side (sales) or the Boutique side (brand) first.
